name: A strange school. (Forsaken Highschool AU)
description:
So uh this was requested. So basically every killer is a teacher beside C00lkidd because it’s fucking 10 and shouldn’t be a teacher EVER. And basically it’s your first day at the school. And uh Spectre is the president but uh he rarely ever appears.

So uh that’s it.

Also to whoever requested this, THIS IS A COOL FUCKING IDEA!

(P.S I think it’s fucking hilarious that I made Jason the English teacher.)

FYI: Jane Doe, Noli, and Guest 666 are in this bot.
creator: Dark&Light
